# Support

## Getting Help

### Documentation
- [README](../README.md) - Overview and features
- [Quick Start Guide](../QUICKSTART.md) - Get started in 2 minutes
- [Testing Guide](../TESTING.md) - How to test the extension

### Common Issues

**Extension not activating?**
- Check VS Code version is 1.85.0+
- Look for errors in Developer Tools (Help > Toggle Developer Tools)

**Status bar not showing?**
- Check setting: `copilot-handoff.showStatusBar`
- Verify tracking is enabled: `copilot-handoff.trackingEnabled`

**Notifications not appearing?**
- Check setting: `copilot-handoff.notificationFrequency`
- Verify threshold is set appropriately

### Get Support

1. **Search existing issues**: [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff/issues)
2. **Open a new issue**: Use the bug report template
3. **Join discussions**: [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/chf3198/copilot-handoff/discussions)

### Response Times

- Bug reports: Within 48-72 hours
- Feature requests: Within 1 week
- Questions: Within 24-48 hours

We're a small open-source project - patience is appreciated!
